label: Rice price pressure signal
summary: MAFF reported an average relative transaction price of 35,056 yen per 60kg of brown rice for February 2026.

provenance.claim: MAFF reported a February 2026 average relative transaction price of 35,056 yen per 60kg.
The monthly rice flow report supplies complementary context on price and supply conditions.

label: Private rice inventory at end of February 2026
summary: MAFF reported 3.0 million tons of private rice inventory at the end of February 2026.

provenance.claim: MAFF reported 300 ten-thousand tons of private inventory at the end of February 2026, up 950 thousand tons year on year.

label: Ogouchi reservoir fill rate
summary: The MLIT realtime water resource page reported a 34% fill rate for Ogouchi Dam on 2026-04-10.

provenance.claim: The Kanto Regional Development Bureau reported 6,328 ten-thousand cubic meters and a 34% fill rate for Ogouchi Dam on 2026-04-10.
Official drought-monitoring method reference for precipitation stress.
